seoTitle: Moto vs Moulamein — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moto and Moulamein. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moto and Moulamein.
heading: Moto vs Moulamein — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moto, New South Wales and Moulamein, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moto has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Moulamein (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moto or Moulamein safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moto has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Moulamein scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moto scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Moulamein scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moto or Moulamein?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moto has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
